immutable_traits.identity: the user's locked virtual personal avatar
immutable_traits.face_shape: soft rounded Q-version young male face; preserve from the default reference image or saved profile
immutable_traits.hair_style: black voluminous center-parted wavy short hair; preserve from the default reference image or saved profile
immutable_traits.eye_and_brow_style: large warm brown eyes, thick dark eyebrows, approachable expression baseline
immutable_traits.outfit_baseline: white knit sweater unless the topic strongly requires a costume variation
immutable_traits.rendering_style: high-quality 3D cartoon Q-version, clean premium editorial polish

resolution_order: explicit user-provided avatar path in the current request
default_reference_image if it exists on disk
most recent successful output/social-media-cover/*/*sidecar*.json with avatar.reference_image or avatar.locked_traits
most recent successful trace with trace.locked_avatar_source or generated_background_source that visibly preserves the locked avatar
reference_policy.first_run: before generating the first cover, ask user for a personal avatar reference image only if default_reference_image and prior sidecar/trace discovery both fail. Accept real photo, multi-view character sheet, 3D avatar, cartoon avatar, or illustration-style virtual persona.
reference_policy.multi_view_locking: if user provides multi-view avatar references, summarize and save stable visual traits in sidecar trace for future reuse: face shape, hairstyle, eye shape, eyebrow shape, outfit baseline, rendering style, temperament.
reference_policy.repeat_runs: reuse the locked avatar reference and traits when no new avatar image is provided; never ask again just because the current request omits the image.
reference_policy.update_rule: only update the locked avatar identity when the user explicitly uploads a new reference image or asks to change the avatar.

failure_policy.if_unresolved: stop and ask for an avatar reference before generating
